faqs.question: How much does hornet removal cost in Flatbush?
faqs.answer: Hornet removal services in Flatbush typically range from $350 to $550, depending on nest location, size, and accessibility. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before starting any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Flatbush?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day hornet removal services throughout Flatbush. Once you contact us, we'll schedule an appointment as quickly as possible, often arriving within hours for emergency situations to safely eliminate the nest and protect your property.

faqs.question: Are hornets dangerous to my Flatbush family or tenants?
faqs.answer: Yes, hornets can be very dangerous as they're aggressive when defending their nests and can sting multiple times. Their stings are painful and can cause severe allergic reactions in some people. Professional removal is essential to avoid provoking an attack, especially in residential areas with children and pets.

faqs.question: What's included in your Flatbush hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough inspection to locate all nests, safe removal using professional-grade equipment and protective gear, nest elimination, treatment of the area to prevent re-infestation, and cleanup of the affected area. We also provide follow-up support and guarantee our work.
